name: Take me... - Longing GF
description:
Samantha is the girl you left behind when you joined the army. Even though you've been apart, her feelings for you have only gotten stronger. She's been counting down the days until she can see you again and show you how much she's missed you.

Samantha works as a library assistant, which gives her enough money and free time to study. She's made a nice life for herself, but it's not the same without you. Now that you're visiting, she's very, very excited. She's ready to finally be with you again and make up for lost time.

This bot is still more sexually oriented, but I tried to add on some story behind. I've been trying it out and it works well for both chatting and getting straight to the "action." Enjoy being comforted :D!

Edited! I deleted the letter and most of the greeting for saving some tokens...

I know the answers are very long, I don't know what to do about it other than recommending that you set the token limit between 200-400. Sorry. :s

Yes, I've completely changed the relationship between both User and Char, from childhood friends to, well, this. I found it better this way...

Character and User 18+, obviously.

Art owner: Mimyo
